problem id: 2ae80ced
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11101010 -> 00001111
  00110100 -> 11100101
  10010100 -> 10110101
  11001011 -> 11011110
  01101101 -> 00001011
  10000111 -> 11111100
  01101111 -> 10001011
  00000101 -> 00111101
  11100110 -> 00001111

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 10100101
